original_description: Run a principle-pipeline on accumulated knowledge. Three modes: enrichment (consolidate memory, raise baseline), detect-gaps (find missing detection categories, promote rules), integrate (surface cross-project patterns, resolve conflicts). Triggered proactively at session start when signal accumulates. Invoke as: /dream enrichment, /dream detect-gaps, /dream integrate.
